name: feynman
description: Single-plugin marketplace for feynman — auto-inject ASCII diagram rules into Claude Code prompts. Add this repo as a marketplace source to install via `/plugin install feynman`.

plugins.name: feynman
plugins.description: Auto-inject ASCII diagram rules into Claude Code prompts. Structure in your response gets a diagram without the developer asking. 13-rule linter + autofix engine. Zero npm deps; MIT.
